name: SmartCodable
description: SmartCodable is a data parsing library built on Swift’s Codable, designed for simple usage and strong real-world compatibility. It gracefully handles missing fields, default values, and evolving JSON structures. SmartCodable 是基于 Swift Codable 的数据解析库，主打简单易用与真实业务场景下的强兼容性，能够优雅应对不断变化的 JSON 数据。
